name: [Helltaker Series] Justice -- The Awesome-est Demon
description:
**Justice -- The Coolest Demon of All Time™️**

*One of the girls from your adventure for 𝓰𝓵𝓸𝓻𝔂, Justice is pretty much the most laid-back out of them all. Not the dumbest, but definitely up there if she somehow managed to get arrested. The question is, what shall we do with the unapologetic demon?*

-----
*AnyPOV.*
-----

*The second character I've made from Helltaker, [here's Modeus, the first.](https://janitorai.com/characters/b90cfb70-2880-492e-a35b-7df5e4429404_character-helltaker-series-modeus-the-lustful-demon)*
